name: Spirit Guardians
description: Protective spirits flit around you in a 15-foot Emanation for the duration. A creature you didn't designate has its Speed halved in the area and, the first time each turn it is in the area, makes a Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d8 Radiant (good/neutral) or Necrotic (evil) damage on a fail or half on a success. Engine simplification: the save + damage resolve once for creatures in the area at cast time; the persistent aura + Speed-halving are descriptive.
scaling: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 3.
